feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: format -- format : サンプルコードの出力を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/format/format.md b/reference/format/format.md
index be84af4fe..b728d56b7 100644
--- a/reference/format/format.md
+++ b/reference/format/format.md
@@ -582,7 +582,7 @@ int main()
 #### 出力
 ```
 queue: [1, 2, 3]
-priority_queue: [3, 2, 1]
+priority_queue: [3, 1, 2]
 stack: [1, 2, 3]
 flat_map: {1: "aaa", 2: "bbb"}
 flat_set: {1, 2, 3}

entry.title: iterator -- generator : タイトルを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/generator/generator/iterator.md b/reference/generator/generator/iterator.md
index 2e29cd8a6..bf595f2df 100644
--- a/reference/generator/generator/iterator.md
+++ b/reference/generator/generator/iterator.md
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
-# generator::iterator
+# iterator
 * generator[meta header]
 * class template[meta id-type]
 * std[meta namespace]
+* generator[meta class]
 * cpp23[meta cpp]
 
 ```cpp

entry.title: promise_type -- generator : タイトルを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/generator/generator/promise_type.md b/reference/generator/generator/promise_type.md
index 555ecf243..6f868b151 100644
--- a/reference/generator/generator/promise_type.md
+++ b/reference/generator/generator/promise_type.md
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
-# generator::promise_type
+# promise_type
 * generator[meta header]
 * class template[meta id-type]
 * std[meta namespace]
+* generator[meta class]
 * cpp23[meta cpp]
 
 ```cpp

entry.title: comp-name -- text_encoding::comp-name : meta exposition-only タグを追加
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/comp-name.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/comp-name.md
index 1a3b13317..4d55a9da0 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/comp-name.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/comp-name.md
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 * text_encoding[meta class]
 * function[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]
+* [meta exposition-only]
 
 ```cpp
 static constexpr bool comp-name(string_view a, string_view b); // 説明専用

entry.title: encoding -- text_encoding : タイトルを修正

+++ b/reference/locale/locale/encoding.md
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# locale::encoding
+# encoding
 * locale[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
 * locale[meta class]

entry.title: operator== -- text_encoding : タイトルを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md
index 27b86d301..0033d9406 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# text_encoding::operator==
+# operator==
 * text_encoding[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
 * text_encoding[meta class]

entry.title: text_encoding -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding.md b/reference/text_encoding.md
index 7ec198144..2ac87ad44 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding.md
@@ -89,7 +89,8 @@ static_assert(std::text_encoding::literal() == std::text_encoding::id::UTF8,
 
 int main() {}
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md]
+* literal()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md]
+* id::UTF8[link text_encoding/text_encoding/id.md]
 
 #### 環境エンコーディングとリテラルエンコーディングの互換性確認
 
@@ -108,8 +109,8 @@ int main() {
   }
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md]
-* std::text_encoding::environment()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md]
+* literal()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md]
+* environment()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md]
 
 #### 外部ライブラリとの相互運用
 
@@ -135,7 +136,7 @@ int main() {
        &err);
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::environment()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md]
+* environment()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md]
 
 #### µs表記の安全な使用
 
@@ -160,7 +161,8 @@ int main() {
   print_microseconds(42);
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md]
+* literal()[link text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md]
+* id::UTF8[link text_encoding/text_encoding/id.md]
 * encoding()[link locale/locale/encoding.md]

entry.title: text_encoding -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding.md
index 0cddc2037..87b0d4db5 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding.md
@@ -111,8 +111,11 @@ int main() {
   ::print(std::text_encoding::environment());
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link text_encoding/literal.md]
-* std::text_encoding::environment()[link text_encoding/environment.md]
+* name()[link text_encoding/name.md]
+* mib()[link text_encoding/mib.md]
+* aliases()[link text_encoding/aliases.md]
+* literal()[link text_encoding/literal.md]
+* environment()[link text_encoding/environment.md]
 
 #### 出力例
 ```
@@ -155,6 +158,10 @@ int main() {
   assert(wtf8 == std::text_encoding{"___wtf8__"});
 }
 ```
+* name()[link text_encoding/name.md]
+* mib()[link text_encoding/mib.md]
+* id::UTF8[link text_encoding/id.md]
+* id::other[link text_encoding/id.md]
 
 #### 出力
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::aliases -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases.md
index 0179fd8a1..34e060191 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases.md
@@ -52,6 +52,7 @@ int main() {
   }
 }
 ```
+* id::UTF8[link id.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::aliases_view -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases_view.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases_view.md
index 0239c5bbf..6efcf2939 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases_view.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/aliases_view.md
@@ -50,6 +50,8 @@ int main() {
   std::println("Number of aliases: {}", std::ranges::distance(aliases));
 }
 ```
+* aliases()[link aliases.md]
+* id::ShiftJIS[link id.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::environment -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md
index 17ce3ed1a..972fdc146 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment.md
@@ -88,7 +88,9 @@ int main() {
   }
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link literal.md]
+* name()[link name.md]
+* mib()[link mib.md]
+* literal()[link literal.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::environment_is -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment_is.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment_is.md
index e7cdc867b..2d1a9a99d 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment_is.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/environment_is.md
@@ -38,7 +38,9 @@ int main() {
   }
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::environment()[link environment.md]
+* name()[link name.md]
+* id::UTF8[link id.md]
+* environment()[link environment.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::id -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/id.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/id.md
index 4aaaf2f48..46d59bdb1 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/id.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/id.md
@@ -362,7 +362,9 @@ int main() {
   }
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link literal.md]
+* name()[link name.md]
+* mib()[link mib.md]
+* literal()[link literal.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::literal -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md
index bc31f5020..bb6d2c348 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/literal.md
@@ -79,6 +79,9 @@ int main() {
   static_assert(std::text_encoding::literal().mib() != std::text_encoding::id::unknown);
 }
 ```
+* name()[link name.md]
+* id::UTF8[link id.md]
+* id::unknown[link id.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::mib -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/mib.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/mib.md
index d621166fe..488be8850 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/mib.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/mib.md
@@ -35,7 +35,8 @@ int main() {
   }
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link literal.md]
+* literal()[link literal.md]
+* id::UTF8[link id.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::name -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/name.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/name.md
index 96d4b4a05..b07e52b7b 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/name.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/name.md
@@ -55,8 +55,8 @@ int main() {
   std::println("Is empty: {}", std::string_view(unknown.name()).empty());
 }
 ```
-* std::text_encoding::literal()[link literal.md]
-* std::text_encoding::environment()[link environment.md]
+* literal()[link literal.md]
+* environment()[link environment.md]
 
 ### 出力例
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::text_encoding -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_constructor.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_constructor.md
index 9323b65f7..308ebd541 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_constructor.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_constructor.md
@@ -66,6 +66,12 @@ int main() {
   assert(te4.mib() == std::text_encoding::id::ShiftJIS);
 }
 ```
+* mib()[link mib.md]
+* name()[link name.md]
+* id::unknown[link id.md]
+* id::UTF8[link id.md]
+* id::other[link id.md]
+* id::ShiftJIS[link id.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: text_encoding::operator== -- text_encoding : コード修飾を修正・追加 #1191
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md
index 609dbae5e..27b86d301 100644
--- a/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md
+++ b/reference/text_encoding/text_encoding/op_equal.md
@@ -54,6 +54,7 @@ int main() {
   assert(other_a != other_b);
 }
 ```
+* id::UTF8[link id.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```
